title: NieR:Automata Ver1.1a
description:
In the distant future, humanity has been driven from Earth by powerful machine lifeforms created by alien invaders. To reclaim the planet, humans send advanced android soldiers known as YoRHa to fight an endless war against the machines. Among them are the calm and disciplined combat android 2B and the curious scanner unit 9S, who are assigned to dangerous missions across the ruined world. As they battle hostile machines and uncover hidden secrets, the two begin questioning the true purpose of the war and the meaning of their existence.

While exploring the devastated remains of human civilization, 2B and 9S encounter mysterious enemies, forgotten histories, and painful truths that challenge everything they were taught to believe. As emotions, memories, and identity become increasingly important in a world ruled by machines, the line between human and artificial life slowly begins to blur. Combining action, science fiction, emotional storytelling, and philosophical themes, NieR:Automata Ver1.1a tells a tragic and thought-provoking story about humanity, purpose, and survival.
